title: Oklahoma Association of Disability Examiners (OKADE) — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Oklahoma Association of Disability Examiners (OKADE), a NADE-affiliated chapter. Articles cover name and affiliation, purpose, membership (no chapter dues beyond NADE), organization/officers (President, President-Elect, Secretary, Treasurer; annual business meeting the second Tuesday of August), meetings and electronic voting, nominations and elections, committees (including the OKADE Korral Newsletter and NDPW committees), parliamentary authority, and constitutional amendment procedure. Marked 'Updated 7/12/05'.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Oklahoma (OKADE) Chapter
source.title: Oklahoma Association of Disability Examiners Constitution & By-Laws
